title: Infosys BPM UK Approved Incorporation of Canadian Wholly Owned Subsidiary
detailed_summary: Infosys disclosed that the Board of Infosys BPM UK Limited, a step-down wholly owned subsidiary of Infosys Limited, approved the incorporation of a wholly owned subsidiary in Canada named Infosys BPM Canada Inc., or another available name. The filing states that additional Regulation 30 information will be disclosed in due course.

key_facts.fact: The Board of Infosys BPM UK Limited approved incorporation of a wholly owned subsidiary in Canada.
The proposed subsidiary name is Infosys BPM Canada Inc., or another name available in the commercial register.
Infosys BPM UK Limited is described as a step-down wholly owned subsidiary of Infosys Limited.

corporate_actions.description: Infosys BPM UK Limited approved incorporation of a wholly owned subsidiary in Canada named Infosys BPM Canada Inc., or another available name.

important_text_spans.text: Board of Infosys BPM UK Limited, a step-down wholly owned subsidiary of Infosys Limited has approved to incorporate a wholly owned subsidiary in the name and style of Infosys BPM Canada Inc.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main disclosed corporate action and subsidiary relationship.

processing_notes: Marked non-material because the document discloses only approval to incorporate a subsidiary, with no transaction value, financial impact, strategic rationale, operating scale, or effective date.
